name: Pistachio Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a medium bowl, beat eggs with an electric mixer on high speed until fluffy.
3. Gradually beat in almond extract, vanilla, and sugar until the mixture is thick and lemon-colored, scraping down sides of the bowl frequently with a rubber spatula.
4. Mix cake flour with baking powder and salt. With a wire whisk, fold into egg mixture until just thoroughly combined.
5. Fold in pistachios.
6. Grease two cookie sheets lined down the center.
7. Spoon half of the pistachio mixture down the center of each sheet to form a 3x10" log.
8. Bake for 30 minutes. Remove from oven; leave oven on.
9. Let logs cool on sheets for 5 minutes, or until cool enough to handle.
10. With a serrated knife, cut each log diagonally into 16 slices. Place slices flat sides down on a cookie sheet and return to oven.
11. Bake for 5 minutes. Turn slices over and bake an additional 5-7 minutes, or until golden on both sides. Remove to racks and let stand until cool enough to handle.
12. Spread melted chocolate over one end of biscotti and let cool completely. Store in a tightly covered container. Makes 32 cookies.
